title: nepeta daenensis
intro: Nepeta daenensis, also known as Daenensis Catmint, is a perennial herb in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to the mountains of Korea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Daenensis Catmint include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating digestive issues, such as nausea and diarrhea. Daenensis Catmint can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Korean medicine to treat various health conditions.
